stories.title: **Headline:** Munetaka Murakami Hits HR No. 11 — White Sox Rookie Tied for MLB Lead

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami hit his 11th HR last night. ⚾

That ties Yordan Alvarez for the MLB lead.

A Japanese-born White Sox rookie is tied for the home run title in late April. That is not something you've ever written before.

#WhiteSox #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Murakami's 11 HRs in 25 games: ⚾

• Most by any Japanese-born player through 25 MLB games
• Tied the MLB rookie record: HR in 5 straight games
• First rookie with 10 HRs before May 1 — ever

$34M for 2 years may be the steal of the decade.

#WhiteSox #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** José Ramírez at 33 — Why the Guardians' Legend Is Playing the Best Baseball of His Life

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
José Ramírez is 33. He leads MLB in stolen bases. ⚾

He also broke a 108-year-old franchise games played record, became the first Guardian to HR vs all 29 MLB teams, and won AL Player of the Week.

How is he still getting better?

#Guardians #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
In just April 2026, José Ramírez has: ⚾

• Set a 108-year-old franchise games played record
• Become the 1st Guardian to HR vs every MLB team
• Collected 11 stolen bases — at age 33

Cleveland baseball is good right now. And Ramírez is the reason.

#Guardians #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Shohei Ohtani's Two-Way 2026 — Pitching at 0.50 ERA While Batting at an .854 OPS

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani: 2026 pitching stats ⚾

2-0 record
0.50 ERA
18 strikeouts in 18 innings

And then he goes back to batting .258 with an .854 OPS.

The Dodgers are 21-6. This is what a dynasty defending its title looks like.

#Dodgers #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Aaron Judge and the Yankees Host the Astros — AL's Best Team Has the Lineup to Prove It

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge has 9 home runs in 22 games. ⚾

5 of them came in the first inning.

He's batting .450 with a 1.726 OPS in first-inning plate appearances.

The Yankees (16-9, AL-best) host the Astros this weekend. First-inning Judge is must-watch baseball.

#Yankees #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** NL Central: All 5 Teams Above .500 — Baseball Is Watching Something It's Never Seen Before

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Every team in the NL Central has a winning record. ⚾

Reds: 15-8 | Cubs: 13-9 | Cardinals: 13-9 | Pirates: 13-9 | Brewers: 12-9

In MLB history since 1969, no division has EVER finished with all teams over .500.

We may be watching that happen in real time.

#MLB #NLCentral

stories.title: **Headline:** MLB's Surprising Early-Season Trends — Walk Rate Down, HR Pace Up, Astros Adjusted

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Through 25 MLB games in 2026: ⚾

Walk rate is down. HR pace is up. Andy Pages leads MLB at .409 BA.

The Mets are 8-16. The Royals are struggling.

Early April tells you a lot. And 2026 is already telling a story.

#MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Dodgers Building a Dynasty — Back-to-Back Champions Are MLB's Best Team Again

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Through April 25, the Dodgers lead MLB in: ⚾

HRs • BA • OBP • SLG • WHIP • Opponent BA

They're 21-6. They have Ohtani, Yamamoto, and Sasaki in the rotation.

The defending back-to-back World Series champions are the best team in baseball. Again.

#Dodgers #MLB
